title: The Breathtaking Lencois Maranhenses

segments.text: These dunes cradle blue and green lagoons.
Rainwater fills the natural lagoons between the dunes.
A unique ecosystem forming a stunning contrast.
A paradise for photographers and adventurers.
Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Lencois Maranhenses, Maranhão — Brazil. An extraordinary landscape of sand dunes with crystal-clear lagoons. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
